name: Grilled Corn with Spicy Butters
recipeIngredient: 6 ears of fresh corn with husks
1 cup fresh basil leaves, loosely packed
1 prepared red horseradish, 2 to 3 tablespoons or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush corn with the spicy butters of your choice.
2. Grill the corn over medium heat until lightly charred and tender, about 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally.
3. Serve hot and enjoy!
